moves.description: The user skitters behind the target to attack. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Burning Jealousy
moves.description: The user attacks with energy from jealousy. This leaves all opposing Pokémon that have had their stats boosted during the turn with a burn.

moves.name: Lash Out
moves.description: The user lashes out to vent its frustration toward the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's stats were lowered during this turn.

moves.name: Poltergeist
moves.description: The user attacks by controlling the target's item. This move fails if the target isn't holding an item.

moves.name: Corrosive Gas
moves.description: The user surrounds everything around it with highly acidic gas and melts away items they hold.

moves.name: Coaching
moves.description: The user properly coaches its ally Pokémon, boosting their Attack and Defense stats.

moves.name: Flip Turn
moves.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

moves.name: Triple Axel
moves.description: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.

moves.name: Dual Wingbeat
moves.description: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

moves.name: Scorching Sands
moves.description: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. This may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Jungle Healing
moves.description: The user becomes one with the jungle, restoring HP and curing status conditions for itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

moves.name: Wicked Blow
moves.description: The user, having mastered the Dark style, strikes the target with a fierce blow. This move always lands a critical hit.

moves.name: Surging Strikes
moves.description: The user, having mastered the Water style, strikes the target with a flowing motion three times in a row. This move always lands a critical hit.

moves.name: Thunder Cage
moves.description: The user traps the target inside a cage of sparking electricity that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

moves.name: Dragon Energy
moves.description: Converting its life-force into power, the user attacks opposing Pokémon. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

moves.name: Freezing Glare
moves.description: The user shoots its psychic power from its eyes to attack. This may also leave the target frozen.

moves.name: Fiery Wrath
moves.description: The user transforms its wrath into a fire-like aura to attack. This may also make opposing Pokémon flinch.

moves.name: Thunderous Kick
moves.description: The user overwhelms the target with lightning-like movement before delivering a kick. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.

moves.name: Glacial Lance
moves.description: The user attacks by hurling a blizzard-cloaked icicle lance at opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Astral Barrage
moves.description: The user attacks by sending a frightful amount of small ghosts at opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Eerie Spell
moves.description: The user attacks with its tremendous psychic power. This also drains 3 PP from the move last used by the target.

moves.name: Dire Claw
moves.description: The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or asleep.

moves.name: Psyshield Bash
moves.description: Cloaking itself in psychic energy, the user slams into the target. This also boosts the user’s Defense stat.

moves.name: Power Shift
moves.description: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats.

moves.name: Stone Axe
moves.description: The user swings its stone axes at the target. Stone splinters left behind by this attack float around the target.

moves.name: Springtide Storm
moves.description: The user attacks by wrapping opposing Pokémon in fierce winds brimming with love and hate. This may also lower their Attack stats.

moves.name: Mystical Power
moves.description: The user attacks by emitting a mysterious power. This also boosts the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Raging Fury
moves.description: The user rampages around spewing flames for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

moves.name: Wave Crash
moves.description: The user shrouds itself in water and slams into the target with its whole body to inflict damage. This also damages the user quite a lot.

moves.name: Chloroblast
moves.description: The user launches its amassed chlorophyll to inflict damage on the target. This also damages the user.

moves.name: Mountain Gale
moves.description: The user hurls giant chunks of ice at the target to inflict damage. This may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Victory Dance
moves.description: The user performs an intense dance to usher in victory, boosting its Attack, Defense, and Speed stats.

moves.name: Headlong Rush
moves.description: The user smashes into the target in a full-body tackle. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

moves.name: Barb Barrage
moves.description: The user launches countless toxic barbs to inflict damage. This may also poison the target. This move’s power is doubled if the target is already poisoned.

moves.name: Esper Wing
moves.description: The user slashes the target with aura-enriched wings. This also boosts the user's Speed stat. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

moves.name: Bitter Malice
moves.description: The user attacks the target with spine-chilling resentment. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.

moves.name: Shelter
moves.description: The user makes its skin as hard as an iron shield, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

moves.name: Triple Arrows
moves.description: The user kicks, then fires three arrows. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also lower the target’s Defense stat or make it flinch.

moves.name: Infernal Parade
moves.description: The user attacks with myriad fireballs. This may also leave the target with a burn. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

moves.name: Ceaseless Edge
moves.description: The user slashes its shell blade at the target. Shell splinters left behind by this attack remain scattered under the target as spikes.

moves.name: Bleakwind Storm
moves.description: The user attacks with savagely cold winds that cause both body and spirit to tremble. This may also lower the Speed stats of opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Wildbolt Storm
moves.description: The user summons a thunderous tempest and savagely attacks with lightning and wind. This may also leave opposing Pokémon with paralysis.

moves.name: Sandsear Storm
moves.description: The user attacks by wrapping opposing Pokémon in fierce winds and searingly hot sand. This may also leave them with a burn.

moves.name: Lunar Blessing
moves.description: The user receives a blessing from the crescent moon, restoring HP and curing status conditions for itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

moves.name: Take Heart
moves.description: The user lifts its spirits, curing its own status conditions and boosting its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

moves.name: Tera Blast
moves.description: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

moves.name: Silk Trap
moves.description: The user spins a silken trap, protecting itself from damage while lowering the Speed stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.

moves.name: Axe Kick
moves.description: The user attacks by kicking up into the air and slamming its heel down upon the target. This may also confuse the target. If it misses, the user takes damage instead.

moves.name: Last Respects
moves.description: The user attacks to avenge its allies. The more defeated allies there are in the user's party, the greater the move's power.

moves.name: Lumina Crash
moves.description: The user attacks by unleashing a peculiar light that even affects the mind. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: Order Up
moves.description: The user attacks with elegant poise. If the user has a Tatsugiri in its mouth, this move boosts one of the user's stats based on the Tatsugiri's form.

moves.name: Jet Punch
moves.description: The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

moves.name: Spicy Extract
moves.description: The user emits an incredibly spicy extract, sharply boosting the target's Attack stat and harshly lowering the target's Defense stat.

moves.name: Spin Out
moves.description: The user spins furiously by straining its legs, inflicting damage on the target. This also harshly lowers the user's Speed stat.

moves.name: Population Bomb
moves.description: The user’s fellows gather in droves to perform a combo attack that hits the target one to ten times in a row.

moves.name: Ice Spinner
moves.description: The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.

moves.name: Glaive Rush
moves.description: The user throws its entire body into a reckless charge. After this move is used, attacks on the user cannot miss and will inflict double damage until the user’s next turn.

moves.name: Revival Blessing
moves.description: The user bestows a loving blessing, reviving a party Pokémon that has fainted and restoring half that Pokémon's max HP.

moves.name: Salt Cure
moves.description: The user salt cures the target, inflicting damage every turn. Steel and Water types are more strongly affected by this move.

moves.name: Triple Dive
moves.description: The user performs a perfectly timed triple dive, hitting the target with splashes of water three times in a row.

moves.name: Mortal Spin
moves.description: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also poisons opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Doodle
moves.description: The user captures the very essence of the target in a sketch. This changes the Abilities of the user and its ally Pokémon to that of the target.

moves.name: Fillet Away
moves.description: The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.

moves.name: Kowtow Cleave
moves.description: The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.

moves.name: Flower Trick
moves.description: The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.

moves.name: Torch Song
moves.description: The user blows out raging flames as if singing a song, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Aqua Step
moves.description: The user toys with the target and attacks it using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

moves.name: Raging Bull
moves.description: The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. This move's type depends on the user's form. It can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

moves.name: Make It Rain
moves.description: The user attacks by throwing out a mass of coins. This also lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat. Money is earned after the battle.

moves.name: Psyblade
moves.description: The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.

moves.name: Hydro Steam
moves.description: The user blasts the target with boiling-hot water. This move's power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50 percent.

moves.name: Ruination
moves.description: The user summons a ruinous disaster. This cuts the target’s HP in half.

moves.name: Collision Course
moves.description: The user transforms and crashes to the ground, causing a massive prehistoric explosion. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it’s a supereffective hit.

moves.name: Electro Drift
moves.description: The user races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it's a supereffective hit.

moves.name: Shed Tail
moves.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using its own HP before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

moves.name: Chilly Reception
moves.description: The user tells a chillingly bad joke before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting. This summons a snowstorm lasting five turns.

moves.name: Tidy Up
moves.description: The user tidies up and removes the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, Toxic Spikes, and Substitute. This also boosts the user’s Attack and Speed stats.

moves.name: Snowscape
moves.description: The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.

moves.name: Pounce
moves.description: The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

moves.name: Trailblaze
moves.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

moves.name: Chilling Water
moves.description: The user attacks the target by showering it with water that's so cold it saps the target's power. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

moves.name: Hyper Drill
moves.description: The user spins the pointed part of its body at high speed to pierce the target. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.

moves.name: Twin Beam
moves.description: The user shoots mystical beams from its eyes to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

moves.name: Rage Fist
moves.description: The user converts its rage into energy to attack. The more times the user has been hit by attacks, the greater the move's power.

moves.name: Armor Cannon
moves.description: The user shoots its own armor out as blazing projectiles. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

moves.name: Bitter Blade
moves.description: The user focuses its bitter feelings toward the world of the living into a slashing attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

moves.name: Double Shock
moves.description: The user discharges all the electricity from its body to perform a high-damage attack. After using this move, the user will no longer be Electric type.

moves.name: Gigaton Hammer
moves.description: The user swings its whole body around to attack with its huge hammer. This move can't be used twice in a row.

moves.name: Comeuppance
moves.description: The user retaliates with much greater force against the opponent that last inflicted damage on it.

moves.name: Aqua Cutter
moves.description: The user expels pressurized water to cut at the target like a blade. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

moves.name: Blood Moon
moves.description: The user unleashes the full brunt of its spirit from a full moon that shines as red as blood. This move can't be used twice in a row.

moves.name: Matcha Gotcha
moves.description: The user fires a blast of tea that it mixed. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Syrup Bomb
moves.description: The user sets off an explosion of sticky candy syrup, which coats the target and causes the target's Speed stat to drop each turn for three turns.

moves.name: Ivy Cudgel
moves.description: The user strikes with an ivy-wrapped cudgel. This move's type changes depending on the mask worn by the user, and it has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

moves.name: Electro Shot
moves.description: The user gathers electricity on the first turn, boosting its Sp. Atk stat, then fires a high-voltage shot on the next turn. The shot will be fired immediately in rain.

moves.name: Tera Starstorm
moves.description: With the power of its crystals, the user bombards and eliminates the target. When used by Terapagos in its Stellar Form, this move damages all opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Fickle Beam
moves.description: The user shoots a beam of light to inflict damage. Sometimes all the user's heads shoot beams in unison, doubling the move's power.

moves.name: Burning Bulwark
moves.description: The user's intensely hot fur protects it from attacks and also burns any attacker that makes direct contact with it.

moves.name: Thunderclap
moves.description: This move enables the user to attack first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

moves.name: Mighty Cleave
moves.description: The user wields the light that has accumulated atop its head to cleave the target. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

moves.name: Tachyon Cutter
moves.description: The user attacks by launching particle blades at the target twice in a row. This attack never misses.

moves.name: Hard Press
moves.description: The target is crushed with an arm, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.

moves.name: Dragon Cheer
moves.description: The user raises its allies’ morale with a draconic cry so that their future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits. This rouses Dragon types more.

moves.name: Alluring Voice
moves.description: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

moves.name: Temper Flare
moves.description: Spurred by desperation, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

moves.name: Supercell Slam
moves.description: The user electrifies its body and drops onto the target to inflict damage. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

moves.name: Psychic Noise
moves.description: The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.

moves.name: Upper Hand
moves.description: The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.

moves.name: Malignant Chain
moves.description: The user pours toxins into the target by wrapping them in a toxic, corrosive chain. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.
